name_cn:
Genuine quality
New arrival🅰️🅰️ CABAS ANAIS Grained calfskin handbag 👜 Small. CE latest tote bag, a different kind of tote.
Especially high-end, exquisite, lazy vintage style, simple and not flashy. Simply too practical; grained calfskin is completely worry-free against scratches 🫶🏻 Perfect for careless besties~ Sides can be adjusted, easily fits a laptop 📒 or daily essentials.
Features one main compartment
One interior flat pocket
Two long leather handles
With long shoulder strap
Style No.: 118613
Color: Black
Size: 20.5 (opening 35) x 9 x 19cm
